reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente tengo que criticar por primera vez a algún lugar. No avanza, año a año cuando llegamos ahí, la atención y lo que se ofrece para comer, deja mucho que desear

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, this is the first time I have to criticize a place. It's not improving; year after year when we go there, the service and the food leave much to be desired.

reviews.comment:
Es la filial  99 del País,parece una repartición estatal,14 Hs. Cerrado la cocina,bebidas en las heladeras , calientes,el personal cambia turnos todos juntos a esa hora,demora 45' para llenar tanque.

(Translated by Google)
It's branch 99 of the country, it looks like a state office, 2 PM. The kitchen is closed, drinks are in the refrigerators, warm, the staff change shifts all together at that time, it takes 45 minutes to fill the tank.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkeXZIXzhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Nunca hay nafta. Los baños súper sucios, precios muy elevados y el shop no atiende las 24 HS. Además los cambistas no te dejan en paz, se siente inseguro y muy mala atención de los plateros.

(Translated by Google)
There's never any gas. The bathrooms are filthy, prices are very high, and the convenience store isn't open 24 hours. Plus, the money changers are relentless, it feels unsafe, and the silversmiths provide terrible service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkd3BUMlZREAE
